summary: Full E2E test of Simon Pham Francheteau portfolio: backend contact API (Resend) + frontend single-page React app. All 6 backend pytest tests passed (root, valid contact, invalid email 422, missing fields 422, empty message 422). All 11 frontend section testids found. All 7 nav links correctly scroll to their sections. Contact form submits successfully, shows success toast 'Message envoyé. Je reviens vers toi rapidement.' and clears all fields. Social links (contact/footer github + linkedin) have correct external hrefs.

minor.issue: On Resend failure, raises 500 AFTER message already stored in Mongo. Acceptable for audit trail but error message could mention stored status to client.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: ContactMessage email validation uses EmailStr (good). Field bounds set (good). insert_one stores _id but endpoint doesn't return Mongo doc, so no ObjectId leak — OK.
server.py: Using @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in modern FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers.
server.py: Resend send is wrapped in asyncio.to_thread (good - non-blocking).
App.js: Lenis smooth scroll initialized once; IntersectionObserver cleaned up on unmount (good).
Files are well-modularized (one component per portfolio section, none >700 lines).
seed_data_creation: Test contact rows inserted into Mongo contact_messages collection with name 'TEST_Tester' and 'TEST Playwright'. Resend test mode returns email_id but only delivers to verified address (simon.phamfrancheteau@gmail.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at https://clean-showcase-50.preview.emergentagent.com/api/. Mongo collection 'contact_messages' has TEST_ prefixed rows from this run. RESEND_API_KEY and CONTACT_RECIPIENT are configured in /app/backend/.env. Custom cursor uses 'cursor: none' so use force=True on clicks.
